We need to interpret data: Several markets about Bitcoin price on July 23: "Bitcoin Up or Down on July 23?: Yes 3% (vol $156,087)" meaning only 3% think it will be up? Then "Will Bitcoin reach $70,000 in July?: Yes 17%" low. "Will Bitcoin reach $72,500 in July?: Yes 5%" very low. "Will Bitcoin reach $67,500 in July?: Yes 45%" moderate. So overall sentiment: strong belief above $64k but less confidence hitting higher targets. Also Ethereum dip to $1500 by end 2026: 47% yes. Bitcoin dip to $55k by end 2026: 43% yes. Mixed.

Thus overall sentiment Mixed: high confidence for above $64k but low
